summary: Phase-2 SEMS backend & frontend E2E testing. Backend: 35/35 pytest tests pass covering auth, pagination shape on 10 endpoints, /users|teams|projects/all, My Work (me/tasks|projects|bugs), task activity (DEADLINE_CHANGED x2, STATUS_CHANGED, ESTIMATE_CHANGED, estimated_hours=8 stored), bug activity (CREATED/RESOLVED/REOPENED/ASSIGNED, reopen_count=1, resolved_at, reassign_count), roles CRUD + auth/me permissions propagation, meta/modules, analytics (bugs/summary, timeline days=30, top user/team/project, delays), and RBAC negative (dev POST /users -> 403, dev PUT /roles/ADMIN -> 403). Frontend: admin login OK, sidebar contains all 10 items (Dashboard, My Work, Tasks, Projects, Teams, Bugs, Time Logs, Reports, Analytics, Users, Roles), Users page shows S.No/Name/Email/Role/Skills/Active/Actions columns, search, Add User, 'Showing 1 to 10 of 11 Results' pagination + page-size dropdown + prev/next arrows. Analytics page shows 5 KPI cards, 'Bugs Created vs Resolved' line chart with 'Last 30 days' selector, 'Bug Concentration' with User/Team/Project tabs. Roles page shows role name select + description + full permission matrix with All/Create/Read/Update/Delete toggles for all 10 modules and Save Permissions button. My Work page has 3 KPI cards + Tasks/Projects/Bugs tabs + paginated table with 'Showing X to Y of Z Results'.

issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in RolesPage — non-blocking but should add key= to mapped rows/switches

action_items: (minor) Add unique key prop to mapped children in RolesPage.jsx to remove React warning
Note: /api/meta/modules returns {modules:[...]} envelope rather than raw array — spec ambiguous; test accepts both. Consider standardising to bare list if frontend expects that.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1368 lines — approaching the >700 line split threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, users, tasks, bugs, analytics, roles).
TASK_STATUSES uses BACKLOG (not TODO). Ensure frontend TaskForm/KanbanBoard uses BACKLOG in create payloads.
Roles page renders correctly but header says 'Create Role' — verify wording intent (should probably be 'Edit Role' when editing existing).
test_credentials: admin@sems.io/Admin@123 (SUPER_ADMIN), kabir@sems.io/Password@123 (DEVELOPER), riya@sems.io/Password@123 (VIEWER, used for role-permission propagation test with restore)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ActivityTask and TEST_ActivityBug during activity tests; both deleted in teardown. VIEWER role permissions were temporarily modified and restored in same test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_sems_phase2.py (pytest, 35 tests) is the regression suite. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Task statuses: BACKLOG/IN_PROGRESS/IN_REVIEW/COMPLETED/REASSIGNED. Bug statuses: OPEN/IN_PROGRESS/IN_REVIEW/RESOLVED/REOPENED/CLOSED. /api/meta/modules returns dict with 'modules' key. /api/roles returns list. Cookies + Bearer both accepted.
